memoryArtifacts.headline: Robert Cecil First Earl of Salisbury
memoryArtifacts.description:
Birth: 	1563
Death: 	May 24, 1612

English Statesman, First Earl of Salisbury. Statesman under Queen Elizabeth I and King James I. Created Viscount Cranborne in 1604 and 1st Earl of Salisbury in 1605. The family remained closely involved in British politics until very recently, when the present Viscount Cranborne lost his position as Conservative Leader in the House of Lords over the issue of Parliamentary reform. Ancestor of Robert Cecil, 3rd Marquis of Salibury and Prime Minister. (bio by: David Conway) 
 
Family links: 
 Parents:
  William Cecil (1521 - 1598)
  Mildred Cooke Cecil (1524 - 1589)
 
 Spouse:
  Elizabeth Brooke Cecil (1563 - 1597)*
 
 Children:
  Frances Cecil Clifford (1593 - 1644)*
 
 Siblings:
  Thomas Cecil (1542 - 1623)**
  Margaret Coke Smith (1562 - 1616)*
  Robert Cecil (1563 - 1612)
 
*Calculated relationship
**Half-sibling
 
Burial:
St Etheldreda Churchyard 
Hatfield
Welwyn Hatfield District
Hertfordshire, England
Plot: in Salisbury Chapel

zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Cecil 1st Earl of Salisbury於1563年6月1日出生在英國米德萊可維斯特明斯特時，他的父親Sir William Cecil42歲，母親Mildred Cooke38歲。他於1589年8月31日與Elizabeth Brooke Countess of Salisbury在英國英格蘭維爾爾索爾茲伯里結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1612年5月24日在英國英格蘭維爾爾馬爾波洛享年48歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭賀特福爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Cecil 1st Earl of Salisbury于1563年6月1日出生在英国米德萊可維斯特明斯特时，他的父亲Sir William Cecil42岁，母亲Mildred Cooke38岁。他于1589年8月31日与Elizabeth Brooke Countess of Salisbury在英国英格兰維爾爾索爾茲伯里结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1612年5月24日在英国英格兰維爾爾馬爾波洛享年48岁，埋葬在英国英格兰賀特福爾。

nameMeanings.name: Cecil
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh (Monmouthshire): from the Old Welsh personal name Seisyllt, sometimes wrongly said to derive from the Latin name Caecilius (see Sisley ). The most frequent modern spelling is a Renaissance attempt to connect the surname with Caecilius in the English pronunciation of its time. The Welsh name is more probably, but not definitely, from the Latin name Sextilius, a derivative of sextus ‘sixth’.

History: The great and powerful English Cecil family first came to prominence with David Cecil, a Monmouthshire gentleman who espoused the cause of Henry Tudor and came to court in London after the latter became king in 1485. His grandson William Cecil, Lord Burghley (1520–98), was Elizabeth I's chief adviser for 40 years, and his descendants have remained politically powerful and culturally influential in Britain ever since. They were originally minor Welsh gentry; their name is found in a variety of forms, including Sitsylt, Ceyssel, and Sisseld.

variants.name: Cissell
meanings: English (Middlesex): variant of Welsh   Cecil  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Sisley
meanings: English (Kent): from the popular Middle English female personal name Sisely (Old French Cecile, Cicile, from Latin Caecilia, feminine form of the Roman surname Caecilius, a derivative of caecus ‘blind’). This was the name of a early Christian virgin martyr of the 2nd or 3rd century, who came to be regarded as the patron saint of music. The surname is generally spelt with C- in the Middle Ages, following the trend of the personal name, and with S- in modern times. Compare Cecil and see also Sise , Sisson .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Cecil 1st Earl of Salisbury was born on 1 June 1563, in Westminster, Middlesex, England, his father, Sir William Cecil, was 42 and his mother, Mildred Cooke, was 38. He married Elizabeth Brooke Countess of Salisbury on 31 August 1589, in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 24 May 1612, in Marlborough, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 48, and was buried in Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Cecil 1st Earl of Salisbury est né le 1 juin 1563, à Westminster, Middlesex, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Cecil, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Mildred Cooke, avait 38 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Brooke Countess of Salisbury le 31 août 1589, à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 24 mai 1612, à Marlborough, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterré à Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Cecil 1st Earl of Salisbury am 1. Juni 1563 in Westminster, Middlesex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Cecil 42 und seine Mutter Mildred Cooke 38. Er hat am 31. August 1589 in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Brooke Countess of Salisbury geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 24. Mai 1612 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Marlborough, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Cecil 1st Earl of Salisbury è nato il il 1 giugno 1563 nel Westminster, Middlesex, England, il suo padre, Sir William Cecil, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Mildred Cooke, aveva 38 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Brooke Countess of Salisbury il 31 agosto 1589, nel Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 24 maggio 1612, nel Marlborough, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolto a Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Cecil 1st Earl of Salisburyが1563年6月1日にイギリスミッドレセックスウエストミンスターで生まれた時，父Sir William Cecilは42歳，母Mildred Cookeは38歳であった。1589年8月31日にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリーでElizabeth Brooke Countess of Salisburyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1612年5月24日にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアマルルボロウで48歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Cecil 1st Earl of Salisbury(이)가 1563년 6월 1일 영국 미들레세스 웨스트민스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Cecil(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Mildred Cooke(은)는 38세였다. 그는 1589년 8월 31일 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 살리스버이에서 Elizabeth Brooke Countess of Salisbury(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1612년 5월 24일 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 말를버루그h에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르에 묻혔다.

pt.1 June 1563–24 May 1612: 1 de junho de 1563–24 de maio de 1612
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Cecil 1st Earl of Salisbury nasceu em 1 de junho de 1563, em Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Cecil, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Mildred Cooke, tinha 38 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Brooke Countess of Salisbury em 31 de agosto de 1589, em Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 24 de maio de 1612, em Marlborough, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 48 anos, e foi sepultado em Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Cecil 1st Earl of Salisbury родился 1 июня 1563 г. в местности вестминстир, миддлесекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William Cecil было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Mildred Cooke, 38. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Brooke Countess of Salisbury 31 августа 1589 г. в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 24 мая 1612 г. в местности марлбороую, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 48 лет и был похоронен в местности хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.1 June 1563–24 May 1612: 1 de junio de 1563–24 de mayo de 1612
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Cecil 1st Earl of Salisbury nació el 1 de junio de 1563, en Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William Cecil, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Mildred Cooke, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Brooke Countess of Salisbury el 31 de agosto de 1589, en Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 24 de mayo de 1612, en Marlborough, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultado en Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
